title: Kreia / Darth Traya — KOTOR 2 Antagonist and Mentor
chunkText: Kreia (Darth Traya, Lord of Betrayal) is the main mentor and eventual antagonist of KOTOR 2. She is a former Jedi Master turned Sith who mentors the Exile. Widely considered one of gaming's best-written villains, Kreia's philosophy questions the nature of the Force itself and the morality of Jedi/Sith duality. She manipulates everyone around her; her true motives are revealed only at the very end. She lost her connection to the Force after the Malachor V catastrophe.
